source: IMF IMTS (International Trade in Goods, by partner country) — api.imf.org SDMX 2.1, flow IMF.STA:IMTS(1.0.0)
note: Row-normalized over the 6 GVAR blocs (zero diagonal). US is the closed anchor (no RoW block / no incoming row). These trade weights define each bloc's ROWDEM/ROWINF/ROWFIN star aggregates and match the hardcoded W in app/src/lib/compute/gvarSolve.ts. Provenance only — the app does not load this file at runtime.
